appraisal.anya: Useful action helps, but she keeps checking whether the earlier promise injury is being repaired or merely covered over by effort.
appraisal.nikita: He feels the room soften a little when the work is visible, which reduces shame enough to keep going.
appraisal.rita: Rita notices that tangible labor lowers friction, but only if it stays concrete.

anya: accept only the visible part of repair
nikita: finish the task without re-framing it as goodwill
rita: acknowledge the labor but keep boundaries clear

anya.world_feel: Work helps, but it does not erase memory.

nikita.world_feel: Action is finally louder than apology.

rita.world_feel: The room is easier when everyone can see the load.
